Name: Central Library
Description: This beautiful library downtown is one of my favorite places to study and explore. The architecture is stunning and it has an amazing collection of resources.

Name: Sundance Square
Description: The heart of downtown Fort Worth with great restaurants, shops, and entertainment. Perfect place to spend an afternoon or evening.

Name: Fort Worth Botanic Garden
Address: 3220 Botanic Garden Blvd, Fort Worth, TX 76107
Description: One of the most peaceful places in Fort Worth. The Japanese Garden is absolutely stunning and perfect for reflection and photography.

Name: Joe T Garcia's
Address: 2201 N Commerce St, Fort Worth, TX 76106
Description: Family-owned Mexican restaurant that's been a Fort Worth institution since 1935. The outdoor patio is perfect for warm evenings and the atmosphere can't be beat.

Name: Fort Worth Water Gardens
Description: An architectural masterpiece and incredible urban park. The active pool with cascading water is mesmerizing and a great place to cool off in summer.

Name: Kimbell Art Museum
Address: 3333 Camp Bowie Blvd, Fort Worth, TX 76107
Description: World-class art museum with stunning architecture by Louis Kahn. Free admission to the permanent collection makes art accessible to everyone.

Name: Trinity Park
Description: My favorite place for running and outdoor activities. Great trails along the Trinity River and beautiful views of downtown.

Name: Modern Art Museum
Description: The Modern is an incredible contemporary art museum with a reflecting pool that makes for amazing photos. The exhibitions are always thought-provoking.

Name: Fort Worth Stockyards
Description: Historic district that celebrates Fort Worth's cattle ranching heritage. The twice-daily cattle drive is a unique experience you can't find anywhere else.

Name: TCU Campus
Address: 2800 S University Dr, Fort Worth, TX 76129
Description: The beautiful tree-lined campus where I'm studying. The mix of historic and modern buildings creates a perfect learning environment.

Name: Magnolia Avenue
Description: Hip neighborhood with locally-owned restaurants, coffee shops, and boutiques. The creative energy here represents Fort Worth's evolving culture.

Name: Fort Worth Zoo
Description: One of the top zoos in the nation with incredible exhibits. The Museum of Living Art (MOLA) reptile house is a personal favorite.
